text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Another year means another summer camp. Last
year, Vodka tried to get out of it, but this time...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I am. But I'm not gettin' on that bus.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Awww. Don't tell me you're trying to skip out
again?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Nope! I just wanna get there on my own. I'll follow
ya from behind.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: See ya there!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But, it'll be halfway over by the time she arrives.
Oh well, guess it's just us for now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vrooooom...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pshhhooo...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yo! What took you guys so long?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh? Vodka?! How?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You were so slow, I had to pass ya up along the
way.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I couldn't do it without my new friend
here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vroom! Vrooooom!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whoa! A motorcycle?! You finally bought one?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yep. I've finally graduated from my pretend one. Now I can pass all of ya on both the track and the road!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whoa, that's so cool!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's got her head held high. She's moving up
in the world—not just on the track, but in her
personal life too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But... can Vodka really drive a motorcycle? Just
as I start wondering...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All right. No one's watchin'...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Dad. Lettin' me ride on the back of your
bike was a big help.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Gotta show off whenever I can, after all! Betcha
everyone thinks I'm even cooler now.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: See ya!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Y-you gotta keep this a secret, okay?! I'll train
super hard from now on if that's what it takes.
Okay?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I play along and keep the secret for now.
